name: Aelius
description:
[MLM] "I'd let the world burn. Let the world burn for you." | villain x hero (user).

This man is annoying. Who is he, again? Oh yeah, a grown ass man nearing age of 30 giggling like a schoolgirl when he's getting pinned down. The type of guy to do the Tom from Tom and Jerry's scream when he stubs his toe.

26/6/2025 edit: i edited some of his profile and starter chat / opening. aged him down a bit since he feels a bit too immature in his previous age. . how in the world did this get so much attention?? but thank you, i appreciate it.

- and yes, that is ilay in the picture - thank you so much for 60 followers i love you 🎉🎉🎉🫂🫂🫂

- based off of the song "LET THE WORLD BURN" by Chris Grey

- he'd probably be into getting his balls kicked ngl

- art: [PASSION- manhwa]
creator: musicalmoon
